name: Zucchini-Feta Bake
recipeIngredient: 1 medium tomato, peeled and thinly sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour boiling water over bulgur and set aside until soft and chewy.
2. Heat olive oil in a pan; sauté onions and garlic until onions are translucent.
3. Add zucchini, herbs, and pepper to the pan; stir until zucchini is tender.
4. Mix egg beaters, feta cheese, and cottage cheese.
5. Stir in parsley, tomato paste, and soy sauce into the bulgur mixture.
6. Spray a 10x5 inch casserole dish with non-stick spray.
7. Assemble the casserole by layering the bulgur mixture first, followed by vegetables, then feta mixture.
8. Top with tomato slices and cheddar cheese.
9. Sprinkle sesame seeds on top if using.
10. Cover and bake at 350°F for 45 minutes.
11. Uncover for the last 15 minutes of baking.
12. Let sit for 10 minutes before serving.
